basic_details.job_title: Burari Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 – Walk in for 27 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Burari Hospital (Govt. of NCT of Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Burari Hospital is recruiting 27 Senior Resident posts across multiple specialties. This is an ad-hoc appointment initially for 44 days, extendable up to 3 years.

important_dates.venue: Office of Medical Director, Burari Hospital

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned. Candidates only need to fill the Google form and appear for walk-in interview.

age_limit.details: Maximum age as on date of interview: 45 years. | Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC (Delhi Non-Creamy Layer).

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions on the date of interview.
qualification.education_qualification: MBBS + PG Degree/DNB/Diploma in concerned specialty from recognized University/Institute
qualification.experience: Must not have completed 3 years as Senior Resident (regular or ad-hoc)

selection_process: Selection is based on Walk-in Interview and merit.
Report between 9 AM - 11 AM on scheduled Fridays. Document verification of originals. Final selection as per merit list. A waitlist panel will be valid for 6 months.
how_to_apply: Fill the online application form: https://forms.gle/QuXk2g2MJzTiYHM79
Take printout of the auto-generated form.
Appear for walk-in interview on the scheduled date with all documents.
No hard copy needs to be sent by post.
important_instructions: Appointment is initially for 44 days, extendable based on performance. This is ad-hoc and not permanent employment. Candidates must have valid DMC registration. No TA/DA will be paid. Follow COVID-appropriate behavior (mask, social distancing). False information will lead to cancellation and legal action. Decision of Medical Director is final.

content_sections.heading: Burari Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Burari Hospital (Govt. of NCT of Delhi), Kaushik Enclave, Delhi-110084 invites applications for filling up 27 vacant posts of Senior Residents on ad-hoc basis for a period of 44 days or till regular candidates join. The hospital is a 768-bedded multi-specialty facility catering to urban and rural population of approximately 10 lakhs. Download Burari Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Application Link: https://forms.gle/QuXk2g2MJzTiYHM79

content_sections.heading: Burari Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: Burari Hospital is recruiting 27 Senior Resident posts across multiple specialties. This is an ad-hoc appointment initially for 44 days, extendable up to 3 years.

rows.burari_hospital_govt_of_nct_of_delhi: Initially 44 days, extendable up to 3 years

content_sections.heading: Burari Hospital Senior Resident Important Dates

rows.date: Office of Medical Director, Burari Hospital

content_sections.heading: Burari Hospital Senior Resident Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A total of 27 posts are announced department-wise with category-wise breakup:

content_sections.heading: Burari Hospital Senior Resident Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions on the date of interview.

rows.details: MBBS + PG Degree/DNB/Diploma in concerned specialty from recognized University/Institute
Must not have completed 3 years as Senior Resident (regular or ad-hoc)
Valid Delhi Medical Council (DMC) registration for MBBS & PG qualification

content_sections.heading: Burari Hospital Senior Resident Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age as on date of interview: 45 years. Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC (Delhi Non-Creamy Layer).

content_sections.heading: Burari Hospital Senior Resident Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned. Candidates only need to fill the Google form and appear for walk-in interview.

content_sections.heading: Burari Hospital Senior Resident Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection is based on Walk-in Interview and merit. Report between 9 AM - 11 AM on scheduled Fridays. Document verification of originals. Final selection as per merit list. A waitlist panel will be valid for 6 months.

content_sections.heading: Burari Hospital Senior Resident - Documents Required
content_sections.text: Candidates must bring: Printed Google form application with photo Two passport-size photographs All educational certificates (MBBS, PG Degree/Diploma) DMC Registration Certificate Caste Certificate (if applicable, Delhi OBC 2026-27) Age proof (10th certificate) Aadhaar / Voter ID / Passport Experience certificates & Publications (if any)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Burari Hospital Senior Resident 2026
content_sections.text: Fill the online application form: https://forms.gle/QuXk2g2MJzTiYHM79 Take printout of the auto-generated form. Appear for walk-in interview on the scheduled date with all documents. No hard copy needs to be sent by post. Apply Online Form: https://forms.gle/QuXk2g2MJzTiYHM79

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for Burari Hospital Senior Resident Candidates
content_sections.text: Appointment is initially for 44 days, extendable based on performance. This is ad-hoc and not permanent employment. Candidates must have valid DMC registration. No TA/DA will be paid. Follow COVID-appropriate behavior (mask, social distancing). False information will lead to cancellation and legal action. Decision of Medical Director is final.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are announced in Burari Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 27 Senior Resident posts are available across Microbiology, OBG, Anaesthesia, Paediatrics, and Psychiatry departments.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date and interview schedule for Burari Hospital SR Recruitment?
faq.answer: Walk-in interviews will be held from 17 July 2026 to 31 July 2026 on every Friday. Reporting time is 9 AM to 11 AM.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for Burari Hospital Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have MBBS + PG Degree/DNB/Diploma in the concerned specialty and valid DMC registration. Maximum age is 45 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for Senior Resident at Burari Hospital Delhi?
faq.answer: Pay scale is as per 7th CPC guidelines adopted by GNCT of Delhi.

faq.question: Q5. Is prior Senior Residency experience allowed for Burari Hospital recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates who have not completed 3 years of Senior Residency are eligible. Relaxed norms apply in case of non-availability of fresh candidates.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for Burari Hospital Senior Resident 2026?
faq.answer: Fill the Google form at https://forms.gle/QuXk2g2MJzTiYHM79 and appear for walk-in interview with printed form and documents.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required for Burari Hospital Senior Resident interview?
faq.answer: Printout of application form, DMC registration, educational certificates, caste certificate (if applicable), ID proof, and two passport photos.

faq.question: Q8. Is Burari Hospital Senior Resident appointment permanent?
faq.answer: No. It is on ad-hoc basis initially for 44 days, extendable up to maximum 3 years based on performance.

faq.question: Q9. What is the age relaxation for reserved categories in Burari Hospital SR Recruitment?
faq.answer: Age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC (Delhi Non-Creamy Layer) candidates.

faq.question: Q10. Where is Burari Hospital located and what is the contact email?
faq.answer: Kaushik Enclave, Delhi 110084. For queries, email [email protected].
